1.name: Scaffold MkDocs
1.description: Create mkdocs.yml, requirements-docs.txt, docs/index.md, symlinks for CONTRIBUTING.md and CHANGELOG.md

2.name: Local Build Verification
2.description: Install MkDocs Material, run mkdocs build --strict, fix any build errors

3.name: File Review — Mermaid & HTML
3.description: Review all in-scope files for Mermaid fence and HTML block compatibility with MkDocs Material

4.name: Link Remediation
4.description: Convert parent-relative links (../) that escape docs/ to GitHub source URLs

5.name: GitHub Actions Workflow
5.description: Create .github/workflows/docs.yml for automated deployment to gh-pages

6.name: Final Build & Commit
6.description: Run mkdocs build --strict, verify zero warnings, commit all changes, push

7.name: Enable GitHub Pages
7.description: Configure repo settings: Pages source = gh-pages branch, verify site loads
